name: CLEAN HARBORS INC
business: Clean Harbors, Inc. is a leading provider of environmental and industrial services throughout North America, including hazardous waste management, industrial cleaning, emergency response, and recycling. It is also the largest provider of parts cleaning services and the largest re-refiner and recycler of used oil in North America. Its two operating segments are Environmental Services and Safety-Kleen Sustainability Solutions.

exposures.sentence: Technology has always been fundamental to our operations, influencing our strategy by increasing throughput and automation at our facilities, and deploying artificial intelligence and robotic process automation to increase productivity.
A cybersecurity incident could negatively impact our business, operations and relationships with customers.
Our Total PFAS Solutions service provides our customers with a single source provider of PFAS handling from sampling to remediation and disposal as well as water filtration services.
Reductions in the demand for oil products and volatility in oil prices in the markets we serve may negatively affect certain of our businesses.
We are also the largest re-refiner and recycler of used oil in North America.

catalysts.event: Kimball incinerator expected to run at full capacity by end of 2026
catalysts.sentence: Our newest incinerator in Kimball, Nebraska, which commenced operations in late 2024 and is expected to be running at full capacity by the end of 2026.
It is expected that this facility will be operational in 2028.

catalysts.event: Signed acquisition agreement for Depot Connect International
catalysts.sentence: On February 17, 2026, we signed a purchase agreement to acquire certain environmental businesses of Depot Connect International for an all-cash purchase price of approximately $130.0 million, subject to customary closing adjustments.
